name: @callmcp/driver-kaicalls
description: CallMCP hosted driver for KaiCalls (kaicalls.com) — the flagship, fullest-parity driver, mapping the CallMCP Driver contract onto KaiCalls' live 38-tool MCP/REST telephony backend. Normative references: SPEC.md at the repo root and https://callmcp.ai/llms.txt + https://callmcp.ai/skill.md for the live endpoint/tool inventory this driver targets.
